injuries.comment: The Vegas Golden Knights placed F Mark Stone on long-term injured reserve on Thursday (Oct. 23).
The Golden Knights listed Howden as OUT for Monday's (Oct. 20) game against Carolina.
The Golden Knights listed Hanifin as OUT for Monday's (Oct. 20) game against Carlolina.
The Hurricanes listed Gostisbehere as OUT for Monday's (Oct. 20) game against Vegas.
The Hurricanes said that Slavin is OUT for Tuesday's (Oct. 14) game versus the Sharks and is out indefinitely, per Walt Ruff of the team's official site.
